---
name: Bug / inaccuracy
about: Report a typo, broken link, or factual error in the material
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Section

Specify the stage and subsection, or paste the link anchor.

## What's wrong

A brief description of the problem.

## Expected behavior / correct information

What should replace the current text, in your opinion.

## Sources

Links to documentation, articles, or books that back up the fix.

## Ready to open a PR?

- [ ] Yes, I'll open a PR with the fix
- [ ] No, please have the maintainers correct it
